title: TOP Addons
description: TOP Addons provides The One Probe information for blocks and entities of various Forge mods.
body:
# TOP Addons TOP Addons provides [The One Probe](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-one-probe) information for blocks and entities of various Forge mods. ## Supported Mods | Mod | Information | |:----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------:|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | Forge | Custom fluid tank info display for all `FluidHandler` tile entities | | Vanilla |
  • Beehive, composter and furnace progress
  • Beacon effects
  • Animal breeding cooldown
| | [Thermal Series](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-expansion) |
  • Machine progress
  • Dynamo, energy cell info
  • Redstone control status
| | [Blood Magic ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blood-magic) |
  • Blood and incense altar info
  • Alchemical reactor progress
| | [Industrial Foregoing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/industrial-foregoing)|
  • Machine buffer and work progress
  • Mob duplicator info
| | [Powah](https://modrinth.com/mod/powah) |
  • Max. transfer rate display
  • FE production info
  • Reactor contents info
|
